song.title: There Is None Like You
song.lyrics:
[C] .E B A E There is none like You. .A E F#m Bsus B No one else can touch my heart like You do. .E E/D# A/C# Am I could search for all eternity long . E To find . Bsus B E There is none like You.
[V1] . A B G#m7 C#m7 Your mercy flows like a river wide . F#m7 B E G# A And healing comes from Your hand. . B G#m7 C#m Suffering children are safe in Your arms. .F#m7 A B A B There is none like You.
